title: US Drillers Pull Back As WTI Soars Past $98
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States fell this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 543, down 49 from this same time last year. title: Rising oil prices could increase food costs—but hoarding groceries ‘makes a bad situation worse,’ economist says
summary: Rising oil prices can take months to filter into grocery bills, and the impact is often smaller than consumers expect.
